items.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
items.summary: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.

items.title: Upscale AI Adds $190 Million in Series A Extension
items.summary: SANTA CLARA, CA, Upscale AI, a pure-play AI networking infrastructure company, today announced it has raised $190 million in Series A-1 financing.
